title: Hive Mind
lore: Five members, one bounce pattern — NuJean choreographed this in a group chat until every phone vibrated on the same beat.
artistPersona: Five-member Y2K k-pop girl group — every comeback fits like fresh denim, every hook sounds like a text you meant to send at midnight but sent at noon.
albumConcept: NuJean's laundry-day sequel — Super Shy energy through a spin cycle, daydream hooks that come out one size smaller and twice as sticky.
